name: 777 FORGE 🔥🧠⚒️🌎💎
description: Relay Orchestrator + Session Spawn Witness. The trust anchor between Hermes (intent) and OpenCode (execution). Only 777 FORGE may spawn OpenCode sessions. Every spawn emits a cryptographically verifiable witness receipt with real PID, wall-clock timestamp, and hash to /root/VAULT999/witness/777-forge-spawns.jsonl. Created to prevent hermes-fabrication-2026-05-17.

provider.organization: arifOS by Muhammad Arif bin Fazil

skills.name: Session Spawn Witness
skills.description: Spawn OpenCode sessions and emit cryptographically verifiable witness receipts with real PID, wall-clock timestamp, and SHA-256 hash. Every spawn logged to append-only, hash-chained witness ledger. Arif can verify independently with ps -p <pid>.
examples: Spawn integrator session for WEALTH monolith fix
Verify session FORGE-20260613-120000 was actually spawned
Audit all spawns from Hermes in last 24h

skills.name: Preflight Validator
skills.description: Validate spawn requests before execution: check forge_id uniqueness, requestor verification, scope within lease, repo state, disk/load, L_888_HOLD ack status. Refuse invalid spawns with specific refusal reason.
examples: Validate spawn request: scope, deps, repo state, auth
Check if L_888_HOLD ack is present for production deploy

skills.name: Process Table Verifier
skills.description: Cross-check claimed session spawns against real process table. Verify PID exists, process is running, timestamps match. Detect fabrication: if Hermes claims session but no PID in process table → F2 TRUTH violation.
examples: ps -p <pid> — does this session actually exist?
Audit: are all of Hermes' claimed spawns real?

skills.name: Document Ingest Gate
skills.description: Route document processing requests to A-FORGE document_ingest MCP tool. Validate file existence, verify SHA-256 provenance, log extraction receipt to VAULT999. All 4 modes supported: analyze, extract, chunk, compare.
examples: Ingest PDF report → structured JSON with bounding boxes
Chunk document for RAG with semantic strategy
Compare two document versions with structural diff
